reason: Functional consistency change, not a redesign: the saved-text file-name template now uses the same ${name} token syntax as sorter destinations (was {name}), and ${slug} — the first line of a file's text — becomes a built-in destination token. The UI diff only updates the wording of the existing settings hint/tooltip to ${...} and adds a ${slug} chip to the existing token chip row in the rules editor, reusing the established controls, palette and layout. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and layouts are untouched. The rest of the diff is TextDropService/SortService/AppConfig and tests. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
